name: Sweet and Sour Pork #1
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Pork steak or 1 lb cooked ham
1 can (20-oz) pineapple chunks-packed in its own juice
recipeInstructions:
1. If using pork steak, freeze it until firm and slice into thin strips.
2. For ham, cut into long strips about 3/8-inch on a side.
3. Brown meat in frying pan or wok, adding oil if necessary.
4. Drain pineapple juice from canned pineapple into a measuring cup. Add water to reach the desired liquid level, then add this mixture to the pan or wok.
5. Stir in brown gravy mix, vinegar, and ginger. Add pineapple and green pepper.
6. Simmer for about 10 minutes, until the liquid begins to thicken.
7. Serve over rice.
